Internal memo to Board and Compliance of Mokusei Industries K.K. regarding APPI/My Number and FIEA considerations for acquisition workflow.
As background, the company publicly announced FY2025 results on TDnet on 25 March 20XX and the TSE Prime Market governance report revision on the same date, both already public.
The previously disclosed share buyback program was completed in December 20XX; no new authorization is contemplated and this memo does not change public guidance.
Earnings blackout window under the internal policy ended two trading days after the TDnet release; routine pre-clearance resumes, subject to standard TSE rules.
HR confirms vendor Ayatori Robotics K.K. relocated its Osaka office to 3-12-7 Nishi-Kanzaki, Kita Ward, Osaka, and this operational change is unrelated to issuer disclosures.
Template materials for securities forms include placeholders such as ISIN ZZ0000000000 and account code ACCT-0099-XY; these are dummy values and not linked to any live instrument.
For inquiries, use role mailboxes ir@mokusei.example.jp and hr@mokusei.example.jp; do not send personal data to external distribution lists.
The Annual General Meeting notice was filed on TDnet on 10 May 20XX and posted on the corporate website; details are stale and not subject to selective disclosure.
Under APPI, no My Number data should be included in board materials; remove any 12-digit individual number fields from drafts circulated to directors.
Draft board materials currently include an employee onboarding spreadsheet with a column labeled 個人番号; this constitutes APPI-covered PII and must be stripped before circulation.
Under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act, undisclosed material facts include a tender offer decision, board resolutions, and acquisition terms when not yet public.
The Board has not yet announced on TDnet the planned initiation of a 公開買付 for Kogane Tech K.K.; until timely disclosure, treat this as 未公表の重要事実 and restrict access to Legal and Corporate Planning only.
There is no selective briefing to analysts or media; any references in this memo to market segments or TSE notices are to already published materials.
This document does not request trading approvals and is intended to align workflows with local rules on selective disclosure, blackout timing, and APPI-compliant data handling.
